bird.name: 斯岛黄眉企鹅
bird.summary: 斯岛黄眉企鹅（台湾作誘惑企鵝，学名：Eudyptes robustus），是企鹅目企鹅科的一种鸟类。 斯岛黄眉企鹅体重约3038.02克，翼长约97.8毫米，嘴峰长约56.1毫米，喙宽度约16毫米，喙厚度约25.7毫米，跗蹠长约28毫米，尾长约84.5毫米。斯岛黄眉企鹅是部分迁…

relations.subject: 斯岛黄眉企鹅
relations.evidence: Possible threats include the introduction of a new predator, overfishing around the islands that would deplete their food source, increasing water temperatures from global warming driving prey away, and pollution. The New Zealand government has taken action to protect the Snares Islands habitats and marine feeding grounds
relations.object_summary: 长期升温改变海冰和海洋环境条件。

relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
